When starting especially in the morning my brake pedal is very mushy and goes very near the floor. When driving and have to break it sometimes goes down a little too far. The dealer said this was normal. I do not feel it is safe. I've never had a vehicle do this. If this is safe

narrative.headline: 2022 Toyota Tacoma: power train leads a small pool of complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 55 complaints with NHTSA. The power train is the most reported area at 18%, followed by air bags (15%) and the engine (13%). No deaths or fires are reported. Air bags stand out for severity: those 8 reports are tied to 8 crashes and 10 injuries, more than every other area combined, so they deserve a close look.

issues.blurb: The most reported area: 10 reports (18%), with 1 crash. No fires or injuries reported.
